classifier_dinov2.note: naive CPU dynamic int8 quantization REGRESSED latency 2.4x on ARM (qnnpack) -- measured, not assumed. DINOv2 is not the bottleneck, so this is not the optimization to ship.

bottleneck.finding: SAM2's image encoder dominates wall-clock. On a real ~20-mask image: SAM2 ~16.7s vs DINOv2 ~2.2s (112ms x 20) => SAM2 ~88% of compute (~99% on a sparse image).
bottleneck.optimization_target: the SAM2 image encoder (ONNX-export + quantize) -- documented future work; the profile here quantifies the expected payoff.
